name: Symantec Endpoint Security
description: Integrates with Broadcom Symantec Endpoint Security REST APIs for device management, incident response, endpoint quarantine, and threat intelligence

actions.name: List Devices
actions.description: Retrieve the list of managed endpoint devices with filtering options

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of devices to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: os
parameters.description: Filter by operating system

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by device name

actions.name: Get Device Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific device

parameters.name: device_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the device

actions.name: Quarantine Device
actions.description: Quarantine a device to isolate it from internal and external networks

parameters.name: device_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of device IDs to quarantine

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment describing the reason for quarantine

actions.name: Unquarantine Device
actions.description: Remove quarantine from a previously isolated device

parameters.name: device_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of device IDs to unquarantine

actions.name: List Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve EDR incidents from Symantec Endpoint Security

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: priority
parameters.description: Filter by incident priority (high, medium, low)

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by incident state (open, inProgress, closed)

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update an incident (close, change resolution, add comments)

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the incident

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: New state: open, inProgress, closed

parameters.name: resolution
parameters.description: Resolution type for closed incidents

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Analyst comment to add to the incident

actions.name: List Events
actions.description: Retrieve security events (threat detections, policy violations) from managed endpoints

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of events to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Starting offset for pagination

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by event type

parameters.name: start_date
parameters.description: Start date for event query (ISO 8601)

parameters.name: end_date
parameters.description: End date for event query (ISO 8601)

actions.name: Scan Device
actions.description: Initiate an on-demand scan on one or more managed devices

parameters.name: device_ids
parameters.description: JSON array of device IDs to scan

parameters.name: scan_type
parameters.description: Type of scan: quick or full

actions.name: Get File Information
actions.description: Retrieve threat intelligence information for a file by its hash

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to look up

actions.name: Add to Deny List
actions.description: Add a file hash to the deny list to block execution across all managed endpoints

parameters.name: sha256
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to block

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description of why the file was added to the deny list
